name: PEOPLES FINANCIAL CORP /MS/
summary: Peoples Financial Corporation is a one-bank holding company headquartered in Biloxi, Mississippi, operating through its bank subsidiary. The Company provides commercial banking, real estate lending, and trust/asset management services to customers within a fifty-mile radius of its trade area spanning portions of Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama. It operates 17 branch locations and emphasizes core deposit gathering and de novo branching growth.

products.name: Commercial Lending
products.description: Commercial loans provided to businesses within the Company's trade area in Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama.

products.name: Real Estate Lending
products.description: Real estate loans offered to customers in the trade area as a core business focus.

products.name: Core Deposit Services
products.description: Deposit products forming the foundation of the bank's funding base.

products.name: Asset Management and Trust Services
products.description: Trust and asset management services provided through a dedicated department at 758 Howard Avenue, Biloxi.
